summary: In a brief interview surrounding an honorary degree ceremony at Michigan State University, Marian Ilitch reflects on her lifelong dream of graduating from college. The source is a short, multi-speaker transcript consisting mostly of expressions of gratitude and general commencement advice, yielding minimal specific business frameworks or principles directly attributable to Marian.

signature_quotes.text: I feel that the big dream that I would have had is to go to college and graduate from college and I didn't do that but today I felt like I graduated
signature_quotes.context: Reflecting on receiving an honorary degree from Michigan State University.
